tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or early diabetes, despite a slightly low fasting glucose. Chloride is mildly elevated, but other electrolytes, renal function, and calcium are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic status and monitoring for possible metabolic disturbances.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
